title: Add Email to Your Next.js App
description: Full email pipeline: React Email templates, Resend delivery, and Inngest background jobs for reliable sends with retries and scheduling.

steps.description: Build type-safe, reusable email templates as React components (welcome, password reset, notifications)
Connect React Email templates to Resend for reliable transactional delivery with analytics
Wrap email sends in Inngest background functions for automatic retries, scheduling, and fan-out (e.g. onboarding sequences)
